InvalidSpriteIDException - org.graphstream.ui.spriteManager中的异常错误类
Launched when a sprite is created with a dot in its identifier, which is impossible in the current implementation.

Pass a point in transformed coordinates (pixels) into the reverse transform (into graph units).
inverseTransform(Point3) - 接口中的方法 org.graphstream.ui.view.camera.Backend
Transform a point in pixel units into graph units, the given point is transformed in place and also returned.

ISODateComponent - org.graphstream.util.time中的类
Defines components of ISODateIO.
ISODateComponent(String, String) - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.util.time.ISODateComponent
Build a new component composed of a directive name ("%.") and a replacement value.
ISODateComponent.AliasComponent - org.graphstream.util.time中的类
Defines an alias component.
ISODateComponent.AMPMComponent - org.graphstream.util.time中的类
Component handling AM/PM.
ISODateComponent.EpochComponent - org.graphstream.util.time中的类
Component handling a number of milliseconds since the epoch (january, 1st 1970).
ISODateComponent.FieldComponent - org.graphstream.util.time中的类
Defines a component associated with a field of a calendar.
ISODateComponent.NotImplementedComponent - org.graphstream.util.time中的类
Defines a not implemented component.
ISODateComponent.TextComponent - org.graphstream.util.time中的类
Defines a text component.
ISODateComponent.UTCOffsetComponent - org.graphstream.util.time中的类
Component handling utc offset (+/- 0000).
ISODateIO - org.graphstream.util.time中的类
Scanner for date in ISO/IEC 9899:1999 format.
ISODateIO() - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.util.time.ISODateIO
Create a scanner with default format "%K".
ISODateIO(String) - 类的构造器 org.graphstream.util.time.ISODateIO
Create a new scanner with a given format.
